div.p: Frame Stack ┌────────────────────────────┐ │ Frame 1 (caller) │ │ return_address: 15 │ │ locals_base: 0 │ │ locals_count: 3 │ ├────────────────────────────┤ │ Frame 2 (callee) ← TOP │ │ return_address: 42 │ │ locals_base: 3 │ │ locals_count: 2 │ └────────────────────────────┘
After Pop frames.count = 1 ┌────────────────────────────┐ │ Frame 1 (caller) ← TOP │ │ return_address: 15 │ │ locals_base: 0 │ │ locals_count: 3 │ └────────────────────────────┘
After IP = 42 (caller code) ┌─────────────────────────┐ │ Caller Bytecode │ │ ... │ │ 42: ← IP points here │ │ (after CALL) │ └─────────────────────────┘
